gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7600 (radeonsi, navi33, LLVM 15.0.7, DRM 3.54, 6.6.10-76060610-generic)
notes: If you switch to Experimental, you're able to get the launcher going. You can even log in and everything seems like it's ready to launch. But when you actually launch the game, the launcher crashes and everything stops. Going to agree with others, the anti-cheat software blocking this game from Proton (for now) is really dumb. Why does an anime gacha need anti-cheat software?
title: Tower of Fantasy
